title: 9 Rolls Christmas Curling Ribbon Crimped Metallic Balloon Ribbon Holographic Balloon String for Christmas Party Festival Art Craft Gift Wrapping, Red Gold Silver
features: Quantity: The package contains 9 rolls of curling ribbon in red, gold and silver colors, 3 rolls of each color, the quantity is abundant and the color is classic, perfect for holiday decoration.
Material: These ribbons are made of PP plastic, smooth to the touch and shiny surface, the tough material is not easy to deform and break during use, and can be used for a long time.
Size: Each roll of ribbon is 5mm wide and 10m long, perfect for decorating balloons and gift boxes, the size is long enough and easy to cut to meet your various decorative needs.
Feature: These curling ribbons are neatly and orderly wound together, the structure is strong and not easy to loosen, it is easy to extract when in use, and not easy to create creases when stored.

Application: The classic colors of these ribbons are suitable for a variety of holiday themes such as Christmas, carnival, birthday parties, anniversaries, baby showers, weddings and more to give your arrangement a more festive look.
